The PR adds missing identity exports to three agents test mocks for provider catalog normalization and external CLI auth profile sync.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main imports and calls both missing exports while the affected Vitest mocks fully replace those modules without providing them; the linked issue supplies the representative missing-export failures.
